scripts.remove:modules: rm -rf node_modules && rm -rf frontend/node_modules && rm -rf backend/node_modules && rm -rf shared/node_modules
scripts.install:all: pnpm install && pnpm run install:shared && pnpm run install:backend && pnpm run install:frontend
scripts.build: pnpm run build:backend && pnpm run build:frontend
scripts.format: prettier --write . && pnpm run format:backend && pnpm run format:frontend
scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:backend && pnpm run lint:frontend
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm run lint:fix:backend && pnpm run lint:fix:frontend
